allow: Bash(which node; which npx; which bun; which pnpm; where npm 2>/dev/null; cmd //c "where npm" 2>/dev/null; cmd //c "where node" 2>/dev/null)
Bash(export PATH="/c/Program Files/nodejs:$PATH" && cd C:/Ibuu && npm install 2>&1)
Bash(export PATH="/c/Program Files/nodejs:$PATH" && npx kill-port 3000 2>/dev/null; cmd //c "netstat -ano | findstr :3000" 2>/dev/null | head -5)
Bash(export PATH="/c/Program Files/nodejs:$PATH" && cd C:/Ibuu && npm run dev 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3000 && echo "" && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"email":"hod@example.com","password":"admin123"}' 2>&1)
Bash(cmd //c "taskkill /PID 14156 /F" && sleep 2 && rm C:/Ibuu/database.db 2>/dev/null && export PATH="/c/Program Files/nodejs:$PATH" && cd C:/Ibuu && npm run dev 2>&1)
Bash(cmd //c "taskkill /PID 15328 /F" && sleep 2 && export PATH="/c/Program Files/nodejs:$PATH" && cd C:/Ibuu && npm run dev 2>&1)

Bash(cd C:/Ibuu/src && sed -i 's/className="w-full bg-neutral-900 text-white py-3 rounded-xl font-bold hover:bg-neutral-700 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-neutral-900\\/10 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 disabled:opacity-50"/className="btn-glow w-full bg-neutral-900 text-white py-3 rounded-xl font-bold hover:bg-neutral-800 transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2 disabled:opacity-50"/g' pages/Register.tsx)

Bash(cd C:/Ibuu/src && sed -i 's/className="w-full bg-neutral-900 text-white py-3 rounded-xl font-bold hover:bg-neutral-700 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-neutral-900\\/10 disabled:opacity-50"/className="btn-glow w-full bg-neutral-900 text-white py-3 rounded-xl font-bold hover:bg-neutral-800 transition-all disabled:opacity-50"/g' pages/Register.tsx)

Bash(cd C:/Ibuu/src && \\
sed -i \\
  -e 's/className="bg-neutral-900 text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-xl font-bold flex items-center gap-2 hover:bg-neutral-700 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-neutral-900\\/10"/className="btn-glow bg-neutral-900 text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-xl font-bold flex items-center gap-2 hover:bg-neutral-800 transition-all"/g' \\
  pages/AdminDashboard.tsx && \\
sed -i \\
  -e 's/className="flex-1 py-3 bg-neutral-900 text-white font-bold rounded-xl hover:bg-neutral-700 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-neutral-900\\/10"/className="btn-glow flex-1 py-3 bg-neutral-900 text-white font-bold rounded-xl hover:bg-neutral-800 transition-all"/g' \\
  -e 's/className="flex-1 py-2 bg-neutral-900 text-white font-bold rounded-lg text-sm hover:bg-neutral-700"/className="btn-glow flex-1 py-2 bg-neutral-900 text-white font-bold rounded-lg text-sm hover:bg-neutral-800"/g' \\
  pages/AdminDashboard.tsx && \\
echo "AdminDashboard done")

Bash(cd C:/Ibuu/src && \\
sed -i \\
  -e 's/className="bg-neutral-900 text-white px-8 py-3 rounded-xl font-bold hover:bg-neutral-700 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-neutral-900\\/10 flex items-center gap-2 disabled:opacity-50"/className="btn-glow bg-neutral-900 text-white px-8 py-3 rounded-xl font-bold hover:bg-neutral-800 transition-all flex items-center gap-2 disabled:opacity-50"/g' \\
  -e 's/className="w-full bg-neutral-900 text-white py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold hover:bg-neutral-700 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2"/className="btn-glow w-full bg-neutral-900 text-white py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold hover:bg-neutral-800 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2"/g' \\
  -e 's/className="bg-neutral-900 text-white px-8 py-3 rounded-xl font-bold hover:bg-neutral-700 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-neutral-900\\/10 flex items-center gap-2"/className="btn-glow bg-neutral-900 text-white px-8 py-3 rounded-xl font-bold hover:bg-neutral-800 transition-all flex items-center gap-2"/g' \\
  pages/Profile.tsx && \\
echo "Profile done")

Bash(cd C:/Ibuu/src && \\
sed -i \\
  -e 's/className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-neutral-100 overflow-hidden hover:shadow-md transition-shadow group"/className="card-hover bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-neutral-100 overflow-hidden group"/g' \\
  pages/StudentDashboard.tsx && \\
sed -i \\
  -e 's/className="bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-neutral-100 flex items-center gap-4"/className="card-hover bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-neutral-100 flex items-center gap-4"/g' \\
  pages/AdminDashboard.tsx && \\
sed -i \\
  -e 's/className="bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-neutral-100 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow cursor-pointer"/className="card-hover bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-neutral-100 cursor-pointer"/g' \\
  pages/HODDashboard.tsx && \\
echo "Cards done")
Bash(export PATH="/c/Program Files/nodejs:$PATH" && cd C:/Ibuu && npm install multer @types/multer 2>&1)
Bash(taskkill //F //FI "WINDOWTITLE eq npx*" 2>/dev/null; taskkill //F //FI "IMAGENAME eq node.exe" 2>/dev/null; echo "Killed old processes")

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3000/ && echo "" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3000/favicon.ico && echo "" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3000/favicon.svg && echo "" && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3000/src/main.tsx && echo "")

Bash(node -e "const Database = require\(''better-sqlite3''\); const db = new Database\(''database.db''\); const tables = db.prepare\(""SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type=''table''""\).all\(\); console.log\(''Tables:'', tables\); for \(const t of tables\) { console.log\(''\\n--- '' + t.name + '' ---''\); try { const rows = db.prepare\(''SELECT * FROM '' + t.name + '' LIMIT 50''\).all\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(rows, null, 2\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(e.message\); } }")

Bash(node -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\('database.db'\); console.log\('Courses:', JSON.stringify\(db.prepare\('SELECT * FROM courses'\).all\(\)\)\); console.log\('Lessons:', JSON.stringify\(db.prepare\('SELECT * FROM lessons'\).all\(\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const Database = require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db = new Database\('database.db', { readonly: true }\); console.log\('CONNECTED: SQLite'\); console.log\('Version:', db.prepare\('SELECT sqlite_version\(\) as v'\).get\(\).v\); const tables = db.prepare\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name\\"\).all\(\); console.log\('Tables:', tables.map\(t=>t.name\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('Users count:', db.prepare\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as c FROM users'\).get\(\).c\); console.log\('Courses count:', db.prepare\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as c FROM courses'\).get\(\).c\); db.close\(\);")
